creator: pyrus@bsdmail.com
text:
The hidraw driver is needed for Yubi and other usb keys. Hidraw isn't compatible with the USBHID framework. So, users have to switch between using USBHID and the older UHID for key functionality.

Are there plans for a replacement or upgrade for compatibility for hidraw functionality for USBHID?

Also, bringing to attention ugold (TEMPer gold HID thermometer), which some may need for its functionality, if it needs an update or replacement driver for USBHID. Thank you!
